sqlMap.insert:
insert into pm_project_maintenance (id, projectId, projectCode, projectName, projectType, projectExecutionState, contractNo, officeCode, type, category, subCategory, processTime, processDesc, processStep, remainProblem, transitHour, processHour, itemModel, softVersion, enabledFeatures, customTos, customCcs, hasReport, quesnaireId, deliverFileIds, remark, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy ) values (#id#, #projectId#, #projectCode#, #projectName#, #projectType#, #projectExecutionState#, #contractNo#, #officeCode#, #type#, #category#, #subCategory#, #processTime#, #processDesc#, #processStep#, #remainProblem#, #transitHour#, #processHour#, #itemModel#, #softVersion#, #enabledFeatures#, #customTos#, #customCcs#, #hasReport#, #quesnaireId#, #deliverFileIds#, #remark#, #createTime#, #createBy#, #updateTime#, #updateBy# )
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;

insert into pm_project_maintenance
id projectId projectCode projectName projectType projectExecutionState contractNo officeCode type category subCategory processTime processDesc processStep remainProblem transitHour processHour itemModel softVersion enabledFeatures customTos customCcs hasReport quesnaireId deliverFileIds remark createTime createBy updateTime updateBy
#id# #projectId# #projectCode# #projectName# #projectType# #projectExecutionState# #contractNo# #officeCode# #type# #category# #subCategory# #processTime# #processDesc# #processStep# #remainProblem# #transitHour# #processHour# #itemModel# #softVersion# #enabledFeatures# #customTos# #customCcs# #hasReport# #quesnaireId# #deliverFileIds# #remark# #createTime# #createBy# #updateTime# #updateBy#
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
sqlMap.select: select * from pm_project_maintenance where id = #id# limit 1

select m.* from pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
sm.memberCode = #serviceManager# (pm.memberCode = #programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #programManager#)
(m.createBy = #userPower# or sm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #userPower#) FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#

select count(1) from pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
sm.memberCode = #serviceManager# (pm.memberCode = #programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #programManager#)
(m.createBy = #userPower# or sm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #userPower#) FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into pm_project_maintenance
id projectId projectCode projectName projectType projectExecutionState contractNo officeCode type category subCategory processTime processDesc processStep remainProblem transitHour processHour itemModel softVersion enabledFeatures customTos customCcs hasReport quesnaireId deliverFileIds remark createTime createBy updateTime updateBy
#id# #projectId# #projectCode# #projectName# #projectType# #projectExecutionState# #contractNo# #officeCode# #type# #category# #subCategory# #processTime# #processDesc# #processStep# #remainProblem# #transitHour# #processHour# #itemModel# #softVersion# #enabledFeatures# #customTos# #customCcs# #hasReport# #quesnaireId# #deliverFileIds# #remark# #createTime# #createBy# #updateTime# #updateBy#
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
projectId = VALUES(projectId) projectCode = VALUES(projectCode) projectName = VALUES(projectName) projectType = VALUES(projectType) projectExecutionState = VALUES(projectExecutionState) contractNo = VALUES(contractNo) officeCode = VALUES(officeCode) type = VALUES(type) category = VALUES(category) subCategory = VALUES(subCategory) processTime = VALUES(processTime) processDesc = VALUES(processDesc) processStep = VALUES(processStep) remainProblem = VALUES(remainProblem) transitHour = VALUES(transitHour) processHour = VALUES(processHour) itemModel = VALUES(itemModel) softVersion = VALUES(softVersion) enabledFeatures = VALUES(enabledFeatures) customTos = VALUES(customTos) customCcs = VALUES(customCcs) hasReport = VALUES(hasReport) quesnaireId = VALUES(quesnaireId) deliverFileIds = VALUES(deliverFileIds) remark = VALUES(remark) createTime = VALUES(createTime) updateTime = VALUES(updateTime) updateBy = VALUES(updateBy)
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(id), 0) maxId FROM pm_project_maintenance WHERE projectId = #projectId# AND projectType = #projectType# GROUP BY projectType, projectId

SELECT m.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, sm.`memberName` as serviceManager, pm.`memberName` as programManagerA, pm2.`memberName` as programManagerB, IFNULL( CONCAT(m.createBy, "-", ui.realName), m.createBy ) AS createUser, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, bd3.`basicDataName` AS projectExecutionStateName, CONCAT(IF(m.projectType = 40, '自定义', ''), bd1.`basicDataName`) AS categoryName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS subCategoryName, qrt.questionContent, qrt.questionOptionsContent, ff.`id` AS fileId, ff.`fileName`, ff.`filePath` FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN projectMaintenance_tempQuesnaireResultLineTable qrt ON qrt.quesnaireResultHeaderId = m.`quesnaireId` LEFT JOIN `fnd_files` ff ON FIND_IN_SET(ff.id, m.`deliverFileIds`) LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` ui ON ui.`username` = m.`createBy` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = m.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = m.`category` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON bd2.`basicDataId` = m.`subCategory` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceSubCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd3 ON bd3.`basicDataId` = m.`projectExecutionState` AND bd3.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = m.`officeCode`
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
sm.memberCode = #serviceManager# (pm.memberCode = #programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #programManager#)
(m.createBy = #userPower# or sm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm.memberCode = #userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #userPower#) FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
ORDER BY m.id desc

SELECT m.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, sm.`memberName` as serviceManager, pm.`memberName` as programManagerA, pm2.`memberName` as programManagerB, IFNULL( CONCAT(m.createBy, "-", ui.realName), m.createBy ) AS createUser, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, bd3.`basicDataName` AS projectExecutionStateName, CONCAT(IF(m.projectType = 40, '自定义', ''), bd1.`basicDataName`) AS categoryName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS subCategoryName
qrt.*
GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(ff.`id`, "$$", ff.`fileName`) SEPARATOR "||" ) AS deliverFiles, GROUP_CONCAT(ff.`fileType` SEPARATOR " | ") AS deliverTypes
FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2
LEFT JOIN projectMaintenance_tempQuesnaireResultTable qrt ON qrt.quesnaireResultHeaderId = m.`quesnaireId`
LEFT JOIN `fnd_files` ff ON FIND_IN_SET(ff.id, m.`deliverFileIds`)
LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` ui ON ui.`username` = m.`createBy` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = m.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = m.`category` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON bd2.`basicDataId` = m.`subCategory` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceSubCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd3 ON bd3.`basicDataId` = m.`projectExecutionState` AND bd3.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = m.`officeCode`
m.id = #projectMaintenance.id# m.projectId = #projectMaintenance.projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectMaintenance.projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectMaintenance.projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectMaintenance.projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #projectMaintenance.contractNo# m.officeCode = #projectMaintenance.officeCode# m.type = #projectMaintenance.type# m.category = #projectMaintenance.category# m.subCategory = #projectMaintenance.subCategory# m.processTime = #projectMaintenance.processTime# m.processDesc = #projectMaintenance.processDesc# m.processStep = #projectMaintenance.processStep# m.remainProblem = #projectMaintenance.remainProblem# m.transitHour = #projectMaintenance.transitHour# m.processHour = #projectMaintenance.processHour# m.itemModel = #projectMaintenance.itemModel# m.softVersion = #projectMaintenance.softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #projectMaintenance.enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #projectMaintenance.hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #projectMaintenance.quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #projectMaintenance.deliverFileIds# m.remark = #projectMaintenance.remark# m.createTime = #projectMaintenance.createTime# m.createBy = #projectMaintenance.createBy# m.updateTime = #projectMaintenance.updateTime# m.updateBy = #projectMaintenance.updateBy#
sm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.serviceManager# (pm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.programManager#)
(m.createBy = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or sm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or pm.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #projectMaintenance.userPower# or m.createBy = #projectMaintenance.userPower#) FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #projectMaintenance.areaPower#)
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #projectMaintenance.areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #projectMaintenance.processStartTime# m.processTime <= #projectMaintenance.processEndTime# m.createTime >= #projectMaintenance.createStartTime# m.createTime <= #projectMaintenance.createEndTime#
GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY m.id desc
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT m.*, IFNULL( CONCAT(m.createBy, "-", ui.realName), m.createBy ) AS createUser, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, bd3.`basicDataName` AS projectExecutionStateName, CONCAT(IF(m.projectType = 40, '自定义', ''), bd1.`basicDataName`) AS categoryName, bd2.`basicDataName` AS subCategoryName, SUM(DISTINCT ws.diff) AS diff, CASE WHEN SUM(DISTINCT ws.diff) = -1 THEN '维保内' ELSE CASE WHEN SUM(DISTINCT ws.diff) = 0 THEN '部分保外' ELSE CASE WHEN SUM(DISTINCT ws.diff) = 1 THEN '维保外' ELSE NULL END END END AS diffName, CASE WHEN m.projectType = 10 THEN CONCAT( s.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE( s.`memberName`, CONCAT(s.`memberCode`, "-"), "" ) ) ELSE prh.salesman END AS salerName FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN temp_maintenance_contractNo mc ON mc.id = m.id LEFT JOIN temp_warranty_state ws ON mc.`contractNo` = ws.contractNo LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` s ON s.`projectId` = m.`projectId` AND s.`projectType` = m.`projectType` AND m.`projectType` = 10 AND s.`memberRole` = 10 AND s.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN `pm_presales_project_header` prh ON prh.`presalesId` = m.`projectId` AND m.`projectType` = 20 AND prh.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` ui ON ui.`username` = m.`createBy` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = m.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceType' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = m.`category` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON bd2.`basicDataId` = m.`subCategory` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'maintenanceSubCategory' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd3 ON bd3.`basicDataId` = m.`projectExecutionState` AND bd3.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = m.`officeCode`
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
0 = DATEDIFF(m.createTime, #currentDate#) 0 = DATEDIFF(m.createTime, now())
GROUP BY m.id

SELECT DISTINCT createBy FROM `pm_project_maintenance` m
m.id = #id# m.projectId = #projectId# m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectCode#, "%") m.projectName like concat("%", #projectName#, "%") m.projectType = #projectType# m.projectExecutionState = #projectExecutionState# m.contractNo = #contractNo# m.officeCode = #officeCode# m.type = #type# m.category = #category# m.subCategory = #subCategory# m.processTime = #processTime# m.processDesc = #processDesc# m.processStep = #processStep# m.remainProblem = #remainProblem# m.transitHour = #transitHour# m.processHour = #processHour# m.itemModel = #itemModel# m.softVersion = #softVersion# m.enabledFeatures = #enabledFeatures# m.hasReport = #hasReport# m.quesnaireId = #quesnaireId# m.deliverFileIds = #deliverFileIds# m.remark = #remark# m.createTime = #createTime# m.createBy = #createBy# m.updateTime = #updateTime# m.updateBy = #updateBy#
FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #areaPower#)
m.processTime >= #processStartTime# m.processTime <= #processEndTime# m.createTime >= #createStartTime# m.createTime <= #createEndTime#
0 = DATEDIFF(m.createTime, #currentDate#) 0 = DATEDIFF(m.createTime, now())
sqlMap.insert:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultLineTable ( KEY id (id), KEY quesnaireId (quesnaireResultHeaderId), KEY quesnaireTemplateHeaderId (quesnaireTemplateHeaderId) ) SELECT qrl.id, qrl.`quesnaireResultHeaderId`, qrl.`questionScore`, qrl.`questionAnswer`, qtl.`quesnaireTemplateHeaderId`, qtl.`questionType`, qtl.`questionTypeForCB`, qtl.`questionNum`, qtl.`questionContent`,
IFNULL(qto.`questionOptionsContent`, qrl.questionAnswer) AS questionOptionsContent FROM `pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line` qrl LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line` qtl ON qtl.`id` = qrl.`quesnaireTemplateLineId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_header` qth ON qtl.`quesnaireTemplateHeaderId` = qth.id LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_template_options` qto ON qto.`id` = qrl.`questionTemplateOptId` WHERE qth.quesType = #quesType# ORDER BY qrl.`quesnaireResultHeaderId`, qtl.`questionNum`

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultTable ( KEY quesnaireResultHeaderId (quesnaireResultHeaderId) ) SELECT qrt.`quesnaireResultHeaderId`
$oneColumn$ AS questionResults
$columns$
FROM $quesType$_tempQuesnaireResultLineTable qrt GROUP BY qrt.`quesnaireResultHeaderId` ORDER BY quesnaireResultHeaderId ASC

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_maintenance_contractNo ( KEY id (id), KEY contractNo (contractNo) ) SELECT DISTINCT m.`id`, SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(m.contractNo, ',', b.id + 1), ',', - 1 ) AS contractNo FROM pm_project_maintenance m LEFT JOIN FIND_IN_SET_HELP b ON b.id < ( LENGTH(m.contractNo) - LENGTH(REPLACE(m.contractNo, ',', '')) + 1 ) WHERE m.`contractNo` > ''
sqlMap.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_maintenance_contractNo;
sqlMap.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_warranty_state (KEY contractNo (contractNo)) AS SELECT DISTINCT `contract_code` AS `contractNo`, IF(diff > 0, 1, IF (diff <= 0, - 1, NULL)) AS diff FROM `view_warranty`
sqlMap.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_warranty_state;
